conversations.content: Today we studied the Campus Network and Information System Security Management Measures. If a student is found using campus network ports to carry out hacker attacks or penetration...
Hacker attack on campus network? That's a crime! How do you counter when discovered?
then the Information Center immediately blocks their MAC address, then isolates the involved terminal device.
Block MAC plus isolate device — keep them offline! Any other network violations?

If it is verified that a student has spread seriously false rumors on the campus forum, then the administrator immediately deletes the violating posts, then permanently bans the account's posting privileges.
Rumor spreading on forum — delete posts plus permanent ban — clean house! What's the third scenario?
If someone is detected spreading illegal information such as pornography or violence, then cut off the information propagation path, then preserve log evidence and lock the physical location.
Porn/violence — cut propagation path, then collect evidence and lock location — no chance given! When any of these happens, what must ultimately be done?

If any of the above situations occurs, then the case must be handed over to the cyber security department of the public security authorities for review, and the involved student must be given the punishment of expulsion.

think: Campus network & information security: three violations: hacker attack → block MAC + isolate device; spreading rumors on forum → delete posts + permanent ban; spreading porn/violence → cut propagation + preserve evidence + lock location. Any case → hand to public security cyber unit + expulsion.
memory: Campus Network and Information System Security Management Measures: If a student is found using campus network ports to carry out hacker attacks or penetration, then the Information Center immediately blocks their MAC address, then isolates the involved terminal device; if it is verified that a student has spread seriously false rumors on the campus forum, then the administrator immediately deletes the violating posts, then permanently bans the account's posting privileges; if someone is detected spreading illegal information such as pornography or violence, then cut off the information propagation path, then preserve log evidence and lock the physical location; if any of the above situations occurs, then the case must be handed over to the cyber security department of the public security authorities for review, and the involved student must be given the punishment of expulsion.
